home.name: Simon, Cheung Tak Leung
home.title: A passionate {fullStack} & {devOps} building scalable and dynamic web experiences.
home.aboutParagraph1: What's up guys! This is Simon, and I'm a backend-focused, DevOps, and Systems Engineer with a strong passion for building robust, scalable, and reliable platforms. My journey into technology began during my time at {cuhk}, where I earned a Bachelor of Science in Statistics (August 2020 - July 2024) and developed a deep interest in distributed systems, automation, and cloud architecture.
home.cuhk: The Chinese University of Hong Kong
home.aboutParagraph2: I specialize in architecting backend services, designing APIs, and managing cloud infrastructure. My expertise covers {techStack}, as well as cloud platforms like {cloudPlatforms}. I enjoy solving complex problems, automating workflows, and ensuring systems are secure and maintainable.
home.aboutParagraph3: Outside of coding, I'm always exploring new technologies in DevOps, cloud, and backend engineering to keep my skills sharp. You can find more about my professional journey and connect with me on {linkedIn} and {github}.

contact.message: I'm always open to new opportunities and collaborations. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions, want to discuss a project, or just say hello!

thisWebsite.title: This Website
thisWebsite.description: Personal portfolio built with Next.js, React, and Tailwind CSS. Showcases my projects, experience, and skills with a modern, responsive design.

urlShortener.title: AWS Terraform IaC URL Shortener
urlShortener.description: Infrastructure-as-Code project deploying a scalable URL shortener on AWS using Terraform. Automated provisioning of Lambda, API Gateway, DynamoDB, and monitoring.

ecsBlueGreen.title: Terraform IaC ECS Load Balancer with Blue-Green Deployment
ecsBlueGreen.description: Automated deployment of containerized applications on AWS ECS with blue-green deployment strategy using Terraform. Includes ALB, ECS, CodeDeploy, and CI/CD integration.

shell.title: Making my own shell
shell.description: Back to basics! A simple shell implementation in C. I use shell a lot, bash, zsh, ps, etc. But I want to know how it works under the hood, so I made my own shell. I take it as a step to get me out of my comfort zone.

stateMachine.title: State Machine Concurrency Control Data Processing Units
stateMachine.description: Designed and implemented scalable data processing pipelines with concurrency control using AWS Step Functions and Lambda. (Job-related project: Details are confidential, but maybe there will be a Medium article to go through what I did!)

algoTrading.title: Algorithmic Trading Competition
algoTrading.description: Developed and backtested a MACD-based trading algorithm for BTC-USDT perpetual futures. Received first runner-up in a global competition.

algoTradingResearch.title: Self-research on Algorithmic Trading
algoTradingResearch.description: Conducted self-directed research on algorithmic trading strategies, focusing on technical indicators, statistical arbitrage, and statistical models. To be organised to show you guys!

artClassification.title: Art Classification with CNN
artClassification.description: Built a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) to classify which painting belongs to which artist.
